regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Napier and wider Hawke's Bay typically charge $90–$120/hr plus GST. Call-out fees add $60–$90. Emergency and after-hours callouts run $150–$220/hr.

businesses.name: ST Plumbing & Gasfitting
businesses.known_for: Gas (LPG and natural gas) installation and repairs, gas appliance servicing, residential plumbing maintenance and renovations; 24 years experience.

businesses.name: Aplus Plumbing and Gas
businesses.known_for: New house builds, bespoke renovations, emergency repairs, routine maintenance and water filtration across CHB, Hastings and Napier.

businesses.name: Bay Plumbing Services Limited
businesses.known_for: Local Master Plumbers firm offering residential plumbing repairs, backflow testing, maintenance and compliance work in the Hawke's Bay District.

businesses.name: O's Plumbing and Drainage
businesses.known_for: Friendly and reliable certifying plumber and drainlayer for maintenance jobs through to new builds across Napier, Hastings and CHB.
